title: The Messiad.
content:
Religion 'twas produced this poem's fire;
    Perverted also? prithee, don't inquire!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Messiad.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
